channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Two Virginia congressional candidates debated an AI chatbot. It was weirdly normal
item.description: On Thursday night an AI chatbot participated in a political debate with candidates for a congressional seat, and, despite a few technical glitches, performed well. There was no robot voice, no off-topic tangents, no personal attacks, no odd “they’re eating the dogs” hallucinations.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: 6 key mobile and IoT/OT attack trend findings
item.description: The role of the CISO continues to expand, driven by the rising number of breaches and cyberattacks like ransomware, as well as SEC requirements for public organizations to disclose material breaches.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: This gigayacht has a glass-bottom pool and stunning underwater lounge
item.description: An architecture firm has unveiled the concept for a 454-foot gigayacht that combines luxury, innovation and style and can accommodate 22 guests and 52 crew members.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI stagnation: The gap between AI investment and AI adoption
item.description: AI continues to shape cloud strategies, but AI implementation is going slower than most predicted. This is frustrating for technology providers who have made big bets on AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei pens a smart look at our AI future
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Trump family will get 75 percent of crypto token revenue
item.description: The Trump family's cryptocurrency platform, World Liberty Financial, indicated in a report released Thursday that DT Marks DEFI LLC, a Delaware-based company connected to the former president, could get 75 percent of WLF's protocol revenues.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Hit the lights: Mets outfit Citi Field for electric light shows
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Mets are lighting up Citi Field, even before their batters step up to the plate. About 70 front-office staffers scattered around the ballpark for over five hours to install 3,500 strips of LED lights on each railing ahead of New York's first home postseason game.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: iOS 18: Maximize your privacy by turning off these iPhone settings now
item.description: Tech guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals some of the iPhone settings you may want to turn off to improve privacy after updating to iOS 18.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Endpoint proliferation exacerbates old cybersecurity problem: data integration
item.description: Newer technologies like automation and AI may offer new solutions to this age-old cybersecurity problem, but they can also be double-edged swords. The post Endpoint proliferation exacerbates old cybersecurity problem: data integration first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI-powered scam targets Gmail users
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon signs deals to build, invest in small modular nuclear reactors
item.description: Amazon announced a series of deals Wednesday aimed at building out small modular nuclear reactors, becoming the latest major technology company to invest in nuclear energy as Big Tech contends with the extensive energy needs of artificial intelligence (AI).
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Netskope extends data security with Dasera acquisition
item.description: Netskope today announced it has broadened its data protection capabilities by integrating data security posture management (DSPM) technology into its Netskope One Platform via its acquisition of Dasera.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Countries that have cashed in on their top-level domain names
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Anguilla is raking in extra revenue from registration fees for its .ai web domain thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, but it's not the only place cashing in on demand for websites with distinctive address endings.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How to choose a flexible unified SASE solution
item.description: SASE is at the top of all CIOs’ minds, and for good reason. When deployed properly, SASE, which combines SD-WAN with cloud-delivered security via SSE, enables all users and devices, regardless of location, to securely access an organization’s hybrid network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: HUD aims to tackle AI skills gap with new assessment approach
item.description: A new skills benchmark model at HUD will assess where employees are in their understanding of AI and recommend a personalized path for training and development. The post HUD aims to tackle AI skills gap with new assessment approach first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Making generative AI work for you
item.description: It’s not often someone can talk about genAI in a “pragmatic and realistic” way, but those are exactly the accolades handed out to AWS Product Management Director Massimo Re Ferrè following his recent generative AI (genAI) talk. It’s not hard to find opposing sentiment.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: BAKERSVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina's mountains, the constant din of a gas-powered generator is getting to be too much for Bobby Renfro.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA AOUN ANGUEIRA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: This 3D-printed Texas hotel is shaking up the construction industry
item.description: The Vulcan is Icon's massive 3D printer, which stands 15½ feet tall and weighs 4.75 tons. It's capable of creating buildings with 12-foot-high curving walls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Fake Jennifer Aniston bikini body ad
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Connect in a crisis with iOS 18's new video call feature for emergency services
item.description: Apple’s new Emergency SOS Live Video feature allows users to share live video footage of the emergency directly with first responders.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ktor 3.0 switches to kotlinx.io library
item.description: Ktor 3.0, the latest version of the Kotlin-based framework for building asynchronous client- and server-side applications, is now available. Ktor 3.0 switches to the kotlinx.io library for handling data sources. The release also highlights support for server-sent events (SSE).
item.dc:creator: Info World
